title: Finite Decision Tree Gini

solver_reuse.target: finite decision-tree bad weighted-Gini QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact finite decision-tree replay computes color-split weighted Gini impurity 3/8 from eight classified rows, while a malformed row claims 1/2, isolating a compact scalar Farkas conflict.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional decision-tree rows only when they add distinct threshold, tie-breaking, pruning, entropy/log-loss, multiclass, missing-value, or numerical-honesty pressure; keep generalization and greedy-optimality claims in theorem or statistical-inference lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed finite classifier table, binary feature values, class totals, root Gini impurity, candidate split impurities, and selected best split as deterministic exact-rational replay obligations.
Route the false weighted-Gini claim through a source-linked QF_LRA artifact and checked Farkas evidence after exact replay computes the conflicting split equation.
Expose the pack through statistics, probability, discrete/counting, decision-tree, exact-vs-floating, and learner-query surfaces.

Keep greedy-tree optimality, pruning, threshold policy, entropy/log-loss splitting, statistical generalization, confidence intervals, continuous feature thresholds, and floating-point tree-training behavior marked theorem, statistical-inference, or numerical-honesty horizon.
